prompt: Generate a stylish streetwear pop portrait of the exact person from the provided source materials, preserving her identity and facial features faithfully. She is looking directly at the camera with a strong, self-assured expression. Dress her in a black oversized leather jacket over a hot pink cropped hoodie, paired with relaxed black parachute pants and statement sneakers. Add hoop earrings, stacked rings, bold layered chains, and pink-tinted fashion glasses. Include a small designer-inspired shoulder bag or crossbody bag for a street-luxe look. Use a bold pop-color palette with black, hot pink, silver, and subtle white accents. Place her against a studio backdrop with graphic pop-art shapes, neon signage, or a saturated pink wall. Use glossy fashion lighting with strong contrast and a polished editorial vibe. Ultra-detailed skin, crisp focus, realistic textures, centered framing
